'''Bipopa Bogzider''', better known as '''Bippi''' to his crewmates, was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] and the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the ''[[Nanda's Luck]]''.

==Biography==
===Life===
An [[Aquala/Legends|Aquala]] from [[Ando/Legends|Ando]], Bogzider had a painful artificial eye, a prosthetic leg, and an archaic mechanical hand. He earned all of these from his experience on his home [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ando/Legends|Ando]].

Some time during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Bogzider encountered [[Pyash Yopayomba]], the [[Pirate queen of Ando]]. She easily damaged his vessel with her [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Majestic (pirate ship)|''Majestic'']]. But one of Bogzider's crewmates, the former [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] [[Sissalik]], showed courage and tried to save Bogzider and ''Nanda's Luck'' . Yopayomba then confronted both Bogzider and Sissalik, admitting that she admired his bravery and defiance. Yopayomba then said that she'd fix up ''Nanda's Luck'' and replace the crewmen who died in battle in return for something. Bogzider surrendered to Yopayomba, snarling with fury. But, a furious Yopayomba beheaded Bogzider with her [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblade]]. After which she growled, "None of my people surrender, no matter the situation." After that, she appointed Sissalik captain of ''Nanda's Luck'' under her command.

===Legacy===
Some time after Bogzider's [[Death/Legends|death]], Sissalik committed suicide by crashing ''Nanda's Luck'' into ''Majestic''. The result of this action was the death of ''Nanda's Luck''{{'s}} crew, the death of many innocent passengers, and most importantly, Yopayomba's death. But the action also avenged Bogzider.

==Personality and traits==
Although he was gruff, Bogzider awarded loyalty and service among his crew.
